examples.title: Basic empty state
examples.description: Title, description, and an action button.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button } from '@lostgradient/cinder/button';
  import { EmptyState } from '@lostgradient/cinder/empty-state';
</script>

<EmptyState title="No results found" description="Try adjusting your filters or search query.">
  {#snippet action()}
    <Button variant="primary" label="Clear filters" />
  {/snippet}
</EmptyState>

examples.title: With icon
examples.description: An icon snippet above the title.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { EmptyState } from '@lostgradient/cinder/empty-state';
</script>

<EmptyState title="No documents" description="Upload your first document to get started.">
  {#snippet icon()}
    <svg
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      width="48"
      height="48"
      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
      fill="none"
      stroke="currentColor"
      stroke-width="1.5"
      aria-hidden="true"
    >
      <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path>
      <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline>
    </svg>
  {/snippet}
</EmptyState>
